---
title: "Publications"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
format-links: false
---

I am committed to making my work publicly accessible. Where a publication is
open-access, this page links to the open version. Otherwise it links to the
author's accepted manuscript (the peer-reviewed, pre-typeset version) in
accordance with each publisher's self-archiving policy. If a manuscript you
want is not here, please email me and I'll send it directly.

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr); library(dplyr); library(stringr); library(purrr)
})

rights <- read_csv("scripts/publications-rights.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
pdfs   <- read_csv("scripts/pdf-matches.csv",        show_col_types = FALSE) |>
  filter(!is.na(match_id), confidence %in% c("high", "medium")) |>
  group_by(match_id) |> slice(1) |> ungroup() |>
  select(id = match_id, pdf_path, pdf_kind)

rights <- rights |> left_join(pdfs, by = "id")

# OA PDFs fetched from Unpaywall live at pdf/oa/<safe-id>.pdf.
safe_name <- function(id) stringr::str_replace_all(id, "[^A-Za-z0-9._-]", "-")
rights <- rights |>
  mutate(oa_pdf_local = {
    candidate <- file.path("pdf", "oa", paste0(safe_name(id), ".pdf"))
    ifelse(file.exists(candidate), candidate, NA_character_)
  })

# Preserve the order sections appear in the vita.
section_levels <- unique(rights$section)
rights <- rights |> mutate(section = factor(section, levels = section_levels))

format_links <- function(row) {
  parts <- character()
  if (!is.na(row$pdf_path)) {
    label <- switch(row$pdf_kind %||% "publications",
                    "post-prints"  = "PDF (post-print)",
                    "pre-prints"   = "PDF (preprint)",
                    "publications" = "PDF",
                    "PDF")
    parts <- c(parts, sprintf("[%s](/%s)", label, row$pdf_path))
  } else if (!is.na(row$oa_pdf_local)) {
    parts <- c(parts, sprintf("[PDF (open access)](/%s)", row$oa_pdf_local))
  }
  if (isTRUE(row$is_oa) && !is.na(row$best_oa_url) && is.na(row$oa_pdf_local)) {
    parts <- c(parts, sprintf("[Open-access version](%s)", row$best_oa_url))
  }
  if (!is.na(row$doi)) {
    parts <- c(parts, sprintf("[doi.org/%s](https://doi.org/%s)", row$doi, row$doi))
  } else if (!is.na(row$url)) {
    parts <- c(parts, sprintf("[Link](%s)", row$url))
  }
  paste(parts, collapse = " · ")
}

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || is.na(a) || !nzchar(a)) b else a

render_entry <- function(row) {
  cat(row$citation_raw, "\n\n")
  links <- format_links(row)
  if (nzchar(links)) cat(links, "\n\n")
  note <- row$attribution %||% ""
  if (nzchar(note) && note != "Rights status not determined; available on request.") {
    cat(sprintf("<small>*%s*</small>\n\n", note))
  }
}
```

```{r render, results='asis', echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
for (sec in levels(rights$section)) {
  items <- rights |> filter(section == sec)
  if (nrow(items) == 0) next
  cat(sprintf("\n## %s\n\n", sec))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(items))) render_entry(items[i, ])
}
```
